nasb.text: But having the same spirit of faith, according to what is written, “I believed, therefore I spoke,” we also believe, therefore we also speak,

esv.text: Since we have the same spirit of faith according to what has been written, “I believed, and so I spoke,” we also believe, and so we also speak,

cnv.text: 經上記著說：“我信，所以我說話。”我們既然有同樣的信心，也就信，所以也說話，

ccb.text: 圣经上说：“我相信，所以才说。”我们有同样的信心，我们也相信，所以才这样说。

csbs.text: 照着经上所记的：“我信，故我说”，我们既然有同一个信仰的灵，我们也就信，所以也就说，
